statusLine.command: input=$(cat); branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty' | sed 's/^Claude //'); effort=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.effort.level // empty'); pending=$(grep -rl '^status: pending' reviews/*.md 2>/dev/null | grep -v README.md | wc -l | tr -d ' '); out="◆ $branch"; if [ -n "$used" ]; then out="$out │ $(printf '%.0f' "$used")%"; else out="$out │ --%"; fi; [ -n "$model" ] && out="$out │ $model"; [ -n "$effort" ] && out="$out │ effort:$effort"; [ "$pending" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && out="$out │ ⚑ $pending"; echo "$out"
